name: E & E Jomarron School Bus Svc
fleet_size_est: 5-15 (FMCSA shows 65 power units / 15 drivers per public snapshot, likely overstated/aggregated)
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (in-county field trip approved vendor)
recent_news: No M&A or news found. FMCSA DOT #1909556 active; also operates under Advance Bus Service branding (contact 786-236-1544, Andres Jomarron).
fit_notes: Family-owned (Jomarron) Miami-Dade school bus / charter operator on M-DCPS approved vendor list; FMCSA registration shows non-trivial fleet (15 CDL drivers). Most attractive of this batch — potential small tuck-in for Summit's FL footprint if owner is open to exit.
